message:
feat: implement sections 10.5-13 compatibility gates, security hardening, verifier economy, and supply-chain integrity

Add 15 new Rust modules (20,261 lines) spanning 8 subsystems:

Compatibility gates (3 modules):
- policy/compat_gates: core policy-visible compatibility gate with typed
  shim registry, mode selection with signed receipts, structured
  allow/deny/audit decisions, and monotonicity/non-interference enforcement
- policy/compatibility_gate: companion module with PCG-001 through PCG-004
  event codes exposing mode transitions and divergence receipts
- api/compat_gate: HTTP API endpoints for gate check, mode query, mode
  transition with policy-gated receipts, and typed shim registry query

Control plane (3 modules):
- audience_token: hash-chained capability tokens bound to specific
  audiences with strict attenuation (child never widens parent), expiry
  enforcement, and per-epoch nonce replay protection (9E.4)
- fork_detection: state divergence and unauthorized rollback detection
  via parent-hash chain validation with Section 10.14 append-only marker
  stream proofs; halts mutations on divergence
- key_role_separation: each key bound to exactly one role
  (Signing/Encryption/Issuance/Attestation), atomic rotation with
  signed transition records limiting blast radius of key compromise

Security hardening (3 modules):
- impossible_default: 5 dangerous operations blocked at architecture
  level, require signed capability tokens with expiry to unlock
- sybil_defense: trimmed-mean/median robust aggregation, stake-weighted
  signals, coordinated fake identity detection; 20% poisoned signals
  shift aggregate <=5%, 100 Sybil identities < influence of 5 honest
- trust_complexity: deterministic trust decision replay, degraded-mode
  contracts with max duration, complexity budgets limiting decision
  chain depth, full trust decision audit tracking

Connector/runtime (3 modules):
- incident_bundle_retention: tiered hot/cold/archive retention with
  multi-format export (JSON/CSV/SARIF) and SHA-256 integrity verification
- rollback_bundle: self-contained release rollback bundles with
  deterministic byte-identical restoration and idempotent application
- runtime/safe_mode: first-class safe-mode operating state with
  deterministic entry, explicit capability restrictions, and verified exit

Supply chain (2 modules):
- artifact_signing: Ed25519 release signing and SHA-256 checksum
  verification with key rotation and M-of-N threshold signing
- category_shift: category-shift reporting with reproducible evidence
  bundles; every claim backed by an artifact with integrity hash and
  a reproduce-this-claim script

Verifier economy (1 module):
- verifier_economy: verifier registration, attestation submission/
  review/publishing, deterministic reputation scoring, public trust
  scoreboard, anti-gaming Sybil resistance, and replay capsule access

Also: add CLI verify-release subcommand, wire verifier_economy module
into main, update supply_chain/manifest Capability to newtype string.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
